hero.title: Premium Digital Goods,
hero.subtitle: Shop premium accounts, BM, farm, autoreg, and more at competitive prices. Trusted by thousands of customers worldwide.

features.instantDeliveryDesc: Receive your digital goods immediately after purchase.
features.secureDesc: All products are verified and backed by our guarantee.
features.supportDesc: Our Telegram support team is always ready to help.

cta.title: Need help choosing?
cta.subtitle: Our support team is available 24/7 via Telegram to help you find the perfect digital goods.

auth.signInDesc: Sign in to your DigitalHub account.
auth.signUpDesc: Sign up with email and password.
auth.resetDesc: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.checkEmail: Check your email for a confirmation link!
auth.resetEmailSent: Password reset link sent! Check your email.

topup.title: Top Up Balance
topup.subtitle: Choose a payment method, send crypto to the address below, and then write to our Telegram support to confirm.
topup.networkWarning: Send only {currency} to this address. Wrong network = lost funds.
topup.contactDesc: Send your Transaction ID or screenshot to our Telegram support. We'll credit your balance within 30 minutes.

about.title: About DigitalHub
about.subtitle: DigitalHub is your trusted marketplace for premium digital goods. We offer Facebook accounts, BM, farm accounts, autoreg, and more — all at competitive prices with instant delivery.
about.missionP1: We believe everyone deserves access to quality digital services without overpaying. Our platform connects buyers with the best digital goods at fair prices, backed by reliable support.
about.missionP2: Since our founding, we've served thousands of satisfied customers across the globe.
about.trustDesc: Every product is verified before listing. Your security is our top priority.
about.instantDesc: Digital goods delivered immediately after purchase — no waiting.
about.customerDesc: 24/7 support via Telegram ensures you always have help when you need it.
about.qualityDesc: We stand behind every product with our satisfaction guarantee.
about.readySubtitle: Browse our catalog or get in touch with our support team.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have questions about a product, need help with an order, or want to discuss a bulk purchase? Our support team is available 24/7 via Telegram.
contact.telegramDesc: Contact us for the fastest response. Click the button below to open a conversation.
contact.availableDesc: Our team is always ready to help, any time of day.
contact.fastResponseDesc: Get answers within minutes, not hours.
contact.privateDesc: Your conversations are private and secure.

footer.desc: Your trusted marketplace for premium digital goods. Accounts, BM, farm, autoreg, and more — delivered instantly.

metadata.aboutDesc: Learn about DigitalHub — your trusted marketplace for premium digital goods delivered instantly.
metadata.contactDesc: Get in touch with our support team via Telegram. We're available 24/7 to help with your orders and questions.
metadata.productsDesc: Browse our full catalog of premium digital goods.
metadata.siteDesc: Your trusted marketplace for premium digital goods. Instant delivery, competitive prices.
